features: Fragrance Oil - 100ml Suitable for Candles, Wax Melts, Cosmetics, Diffusers, Soaps
Fragrance oils are completely synthetic, and they should not be confused with Essential Oils.
Suitable In Soaps, Candles, Oil Burners, Wax Melts, Bath Salts, Bath Bombs, Slime, Cosmetic Products.
description: Directions For candle and wax melt usage, ensure the fragrance oil is mixed properly with the wax before pouring into the mold. For cosmetics and soap making, follow standard procedures for adding fragrance to your recipes. Always adhere to recommended usage rates and ensure the final product is safe for its intended use.
